main.description: Details about a specific contribution including role, description, and timeframe.

role.description: Role or title of the contributor.

contributionDescription.description: Description of what the contribution concretely involved.

startDate.description: When this contribution started. Should fall within the parent hypercert's timeframe.

endDate.description: When this contribution finished. Should fall within the parent hypercert's timeframe.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this record was originally created.
